violations.description: EMPLOYEE HYGIENE (5 pts): Employee noted handling food while hands were contaminated and did not wash hands before starting work. Hand wash had not been turned on yet.

HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no hot water provided. The hot water had not been turned on yet and was then turned on to correct the violation. | HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): The hand washing lavatory noted with no running water provided. Water had not been hooked up prior to set up as required. critical violation corrected by getting water operating correctly.

PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): A switch needs to be installed on the water pump so it does not have to be plugged and unplugged between uses. If this is not corrected by the next inspection a critical violation may be necessary so hands are not contaminated by touching cord between uses. | PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Plumbing for faucets noted leaking.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the truck noted in need of cleaning.
